title: KAPA2G Robust PCR
description: Roche KAPA2G Robust DNA Polymerase: 25 uL fast, inhibitor-tolerant Taq reaction with a 95 C / 15 sec denaturation.

payload.notes: Vendor: Roche / KAPA Biosystems, KAPA2G Robust DNA Polymerase / PCR Kit (Cat. KK5004 / KK5005; TDS KR0379). Fast, inhibitor-tolerant Taq. Annealing ~60 C for most assays (55 C if Tm < 55 C, 65 C if Tm > 65 C; the 60 C shown is a starting point). 1X Buffer A = 1.5 mM MgCl2. Extension 15 sec/kb (15 sec/cycle for <= 1 kb), increase to 30-60 sec/kb in 15 sec steps for longer/difficult amplicons. Cycle count 30-40 (35 typical). Use up to 1 U per 25 uL for GC-rich/crude templates; optional 1X KAPA Enhancer 1 or DMSO for GC-rich. Use 5 min at 95 C for the initial denaturation with >70% GC templates. The KR0379 cycling table lists no explicit hold step. Source: Roche/KAPA KAPA2G Robust PCR Kit Technical Data Sheet (KR0379).
